TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Babau, title = Babau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Babau} }

S.FORM: alang Babau ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 222 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 213 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Babau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Babau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Babau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Babau hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Babau hya' ga Qmocyan. tay mkyahu' na Babau hya' ga Qnau. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Babau ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 222 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 213 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Babau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Babau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Babau hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Babau hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Babau hya' ga Qmocyan. tay mkyahu' na Babau hya' ga Qnau. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βaβau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βaβau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βaβau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaβau ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaβau ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βaβau ħjaʔ ɣa qmoʦ~ʨjan. taj mkjaħuʔ na βaβau ħjaʔ ɣa qnau. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
